Powered by Stellar Blockchain

Invoice clients.
Get paid in crypto.

StellarInvoice lets freelancers create professional invoices and receive payments in XLM or USDC — fast, borderless, and on-chain.

Everything you need to get paid

Instant Payments

Get paid in seconds with Stellar's 3-5 second settlement time.

Secure & Transparent

Every payment is recorded on the Stellar blockchain — immutable and verifiable.

Global Reach

Accept XLM or USDC from clients anywhere in the world, no banks needed.

Auto Verification

Payments are automatically verified on-chain. No manual confirmation needed.

Ready to get paid on-chain?

Connect your Freighter wallet and create your first invoice in under 2 minutes.

© 2026 StellarInvoice. Built on the Stellar Network.
